displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi #3: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider, Part 1
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi 3 is the third issue in the Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi series of comics. It was published on December 1, 1993 by Dark Horse Comics having been previewed in full, split across Dark Horse Comics #7, #8 and #9, earlier that year.
title: Tales of the Jedi #3: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider, Part 1
